note: Each instrument contains the latest available close and previous valid close. Dates follow each instrument's own trading calendar. display_close/display_change/as_of_label are preformatted for downstream report generation. ^TNX is transformed from Yahoo's quoted value into actual 10Y Treasury yield percent.

semiconductor_supply_chain.judgment: 需求 > 成本壓力（短期仍偏多），但波動放大

assessment: 若油價上行 → USD 轉強
若風險偏好回升 → TWD 偏強
